query:
SELECT id, displayName, livesRemaining FROM participants WHERE id IN (120001, 60011);
SELECT id, participantId, dailyLogId, reason, createdAt FROM payment_events WHERE participantId IN (120001, 60011) ORDER BY participantId, dailyLogId, createdAt;
